case_title: DELANEY CASEY VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DELANEY CASEY IS NOT PRESENT (NOTIFIED BY PHONE). DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP., IS NOT PRESENT (NOTIFIED BY PHONE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF DELANEY CASEY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASEY, DELANEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION $8,325.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
